sections.label: Chorus
lines: A mah’n hong kha Amah’n hong kha,
Ama khut tawh A mah’n hong kha,
A
nung mantak ka zui ding hi,
Ama khut in kei hong kha hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Khatvei leh Eden bang nuamna,
Khatvei leh khuamialna thukpi,
Bang ka tuak hang muanna
launa,
Ka Pasian in kei hong kha hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Phunlo puamlo lungkim takin,
Topa na khut ka len nuam hi.
Bangbang tuak zong bang
lungkhamna,
Ka Pasian in kei hong kha hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Na hehpihna tawh galzo a
Nasep ka khit ciang a vekpi’n;
Sih ding lau lo Pasian in
ah,
Jordan gungal ah hong kha hi.
